author: smuzaffar
body: In order to avoid cyclic dependency (https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/28415) we had merged `Geometry/CommonDetUnit` in to  `Geometry/CommonTopologies` (https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/28500) . This PR is to cleanup the usage of `Geometry/CommonDetUnit`
title: [L1] Drop Geometry/CommonDetUnit package
